title: shrink app wrapper facade
summary: Reduce src/sattlint/app.py by collapsing safe pass-through wrappers and removing touched typing debt without changing CLI entrypoints.
validation: python -m pytest --no-cov tests/test_cli.py tests/test_app_cli_commands.py tests/test_app_config_validation.py tests/test_app_menus.py -x -q --tb=short

python -m coverage run -m pytest --no-cov tests/test_cli.py tests/test_app_cli_commands.py tests/test_app_config_validation.py tests/test_app_menus.py tests/test_app_analysis.py tests/test_app_coverage.py -q && python -m coverage report -m --include='*/src/sattlint/app.py'
